children.text: It's six o'clock in the morning. Yuanyuan gets up. Her mum is at work.
children.cn: 早上六点钟。圆圆起床了。她的妈妈在工作。
children.notes: in the morning 表示在早上；gets up 是 get up 的第三人称单数形式；at work 表示在上班。
children.statement: “gets”是因为主语 Yuanyuan 是第三人称单数。
children.explanation: 单三主语，谓语动词要加 s/es。
children.keywords: six o'clock, gets up, at work

children.text: It's seven o'clock in the morning. Yuanyuan goes to school. Her mum goes home.
children.cn: 早上七点钟。圆圆去上学。她的妈妈回家了。
children.notes: goes to school 表示去上学；goes home 表示回家（home 是副词，不加 to）。
children.statement: 在“goes home”中，home 前面不需要加 to。
children.explanation: home, here, there 等副词前不加 to。

children.text: It's half past eight in the morning... Yuanyuan has classes at school. Her mum goes to bed.
children.cn: 早上八点半……圆圆在学校上课。她的妈妈去睡觉了。
children.notes: half past eight 表示八点半；has classes 表示上课；goes to bed 表示上床睡觉。
children.statement: 圆圆上课的时候，妈妈也正在工作。
children.explanation: 妈妈这时已经回家“goes to bed”睡觉了。

children.text: It's five o'clock in the afternoon. Yuanyuan goes home. Her mum goes to work.
children.cn: 下午五点钟。圆圆回家了。她的妈妈去上班了。
children.notes: in the afternoon 表示在下午；goes to work 表示去上班。
children.explanation: morning 早上，afternoon 下午，evening 晚上。

children.text: It's nine o'clock in the evening. Yuanyuan goes to bed. Her mum is at work.
children.cn: 晚上九点钟。圆圆上床睡觉了。她的妈妈在工作。
children.notes: in the evening 表示在晚上；at work 再次强调妈妈在加班/值班。
children.statement: 圆圆睡觉的时候，妈妈正在家里陪着她。
children.explanation: 文中说“Her mum is at work”，妈妈在工作。
